name: Captrix caption styling controls
description: Verifies caption text, style, size, and position controls.

planSteps.description: Replace data-testid=caption-input with 'Launch clips faster with styled captions.'.
data-testid=caption-overlay updates with 'Launch clips faster with styled captions.'.
Click data-testid=style-karaoke, move data-testid=caption-size to a larger value, then click data-testid=position-top.
The caption remains visible, the active style metric shows Karaoke, and the active position control is Top.
